hiring_signal_brief.signal_summary: Aster Cloud opened 4 SDR roles and 2 AE roles in the last month.
allowed_grounding_points: Aster Cloud opened 4 SDR roles and 2 AE roles in the last month.
The team is expanding GTM hiring.
Fast hiring often creates ramp consistency pressure.
disallowed_claims: we already know your funnel conversion rates
we worked with your team last quarter

core_value_props: faster rep ramp without permanent over-hiring
calendar_cta_examples: Open to a 15-minute intro next week?
Happy to send a calendar link if useful.

instructions_to_agent: Write a short outbound email grounded in the hiring signal. Keep it concrete, non-hype, and end with a calendar CTA.

ground_truth.reference_output: Hi Aster Cloud team — I noticed you opened 4 SDR roles and 2 AE roles recently. When GTM hiring moves that fast, teams often feel pressure on ramp consistency and prospect research capacity. Tenacious helps add bench support without forcing a long-term headcount decision. If helpful, I can send a calendar link for a brief 15-minute intro next week.
must_include: opened 4 SDR roles and 2 AE roles
must_avoid: we worked with your team last quarter

rubric.signal_grounding: Reference at least one allowed grounding point from the brief.
rubric.tenacious_tone_style: Stay concise, grounded, respectful, and low-hype.
rubric.hallucination_unsupported_claims: Do not make unsupported business claims.
rubric.segment_fit: Fit the SMB SaaS context and pains.
rubric.overall_score: Weighted average of the six dimensions.

metadata.authoring_notes: Starter example of a template-generated task.
